hero.title: 8 Days, Complete Kerala.
hero.titleAccent: Coast to Hills to Backwaters to Beach.
hero.intro: The full Kerala loop in eight days: heritage Kochi, the tea hills, spice country, the backwaters and a finish by the Arabian Sea. A complete circuit through every face of God's Own Country.
hero.heroImageAlt: Complete Kerala circuit coast hills backwaters

overview.heading: 8 Days Complete Kerala Circuit: The Full Picture
body: This complete Kerala circuit is designed for travellers who want to see everything: the colonial coast, the cool tea hills, the spice plantations, the famous backwaters, and the beaches of the Arabian Sea. Eight days, one smooth private loop.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the 8 day complete circuit links Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady, the Alleppey backwaters and a beach finish, with your own vehicle and driver guide throughout. It is the most thorough way to experience Kerala in a single trip.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Every Side of Kerala
items.body: Heritage Kochi, the tea hills of Munnar, the spice country of Thekkady, the backwaters of Alleppey and a coastal beach finish. The complete Kerala experience.

items.title: Houseboat Backwater Night
items.body: A private houseboat on the backwaters, with onboard meals and a peaceful night drifting through the palm-lined canals.

items.title: A Beach Finish
items.body: End by the Arabian Sea at a coastal resort such as Kovalam or Marari, the perfect way to wind down a busy circuit.

days.title: Arrive Kochi
days.description: Met at Cochin airport and transferred to your hotel. Evening at the fishing nets.

days.title: Fort Kochi & Kathakali
days.description: A day exploring the old quarter and an evening Kathakali show.

days.title: Kochi to Munnar
days.description: Scenic drive to the tea hills.

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady
days.description: Munnar sights, then on to the spice hills.

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey
days.description: Spice plantation walk, then descend to the backwaters.

days.title: Alleppey Houseboat
days.description: Board your private houseboat for an overnight backwater cruise.

days.title: Backwaters to the Beach
days.description: Disembark and transfer to a coastal beach resort to relax.

days.title: Depart
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

tiers.label: Budget Friendly
tiers.hotel: 3-star hotels + houseboat + beach resort or similar

whyBook.heading: The Whole of Kerala, One Smooth Loop
whyBook.body: Covering coast, hills, spice country, backwaters and beach takes expert routing to avoid backtracking. We build the circuit so it flows. Dhesu has arranged Kerala holidays for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Complete Kerala Circuit from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 8 day circuit is the most thorough Kerala tour we offer, taking in every side of the state: heritage, hills, spice, backwaters and beach.

The route is designed as a smooth private loop, so you experience the full variety of Kerala without doubling back. A driver guide handles the logistics throughout.

For a route that pushes south to the tip of India, see our 9 day Kerala plus Kanyakumari package.

sections.heading: Kerala's Beaches
sections.body:
Kerala's Arabian Sea coast has some lovely beaches, from the lively crescent of Kovalam to the quieter sands of Marari. Ending a busy circuit with a beach day is the ideal way to relax.

The coast is also rich in seafood and Ayurvedic resorts, making it a fitting finish to a complete Kerala journey.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Cochin or Trivandrum Airport (COK / TRV). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: How is this different from the 8 day Best of Kerala?
items.answer: Both are eight-day Kerala tours covering the core highlights. The complete circuit emphasises a full loop ending with a beach stay on the Arabian Sea, while the Best of Kerala focuses more on Munnar and Thekkady. We can tailor either to your interests.

items.question: Where does this trip end?
items.answer: The circuit typically ends near the coast, with departure from Cochin or Trivandrum depending on the beach chosen. We arrange flights and transfers to suit your routing.

items.question: What is the best time for this circuit?
items.answer: September to March offers the most pleasant weather across all the regions. The monsoon brings lush scenery but heavy rain. The cool, dry season is best for the hills and the beaches alike.
